summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one at the opening to carry forward Silas bringing his sign chest to Junie's yard after losing the shop, and one at the close to set up Junie's apron tie and the next morning's board-building work.
edits: Added a brief opening reference to Silas's sign chest under Junie's lean-to for continuity with chapter 14's ending.
Added a closing beat where Junie tosses Silas a frayed apron tie and tells him to wrap his wrist before pulling nails tomorrow, feeding directly into chapter 16.
Kept the chapter opening structure and core scene beats intact because its entry scaffold was already distinct from the adjacent visible opening.
